title: Variable
description: A Variable is an environment variable or secret reference used by Cells and Constructs.

name.description: The SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE name of the variable.

source.description: Where the variable value comes from.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this variable is used for.

value.description: The literal value when source is 'literal', or the secret/output reference path when source is 'secret' or 'output'.

required.description: Whether this variable must be present for the cell to run.

environment.description: If set, this variable is scoped to a specific Environment.
